name: Scalloped Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the flour and salt, stirring constantly until the mixture is well combined.
3. Gradually add the chicken broth, stirring continuously to prevent lumps.
4. Cook the sauce for 5 minutes or until it thickens.
5. Stir in the diced cooked chicken, bread crumbs, and macaroni into the sauce.
6. In a greased baking dish, layer alternating slices of hard-boiled eggs, chicken-macaroni mixture, and more of the chicken-macaroni mixture.
7. Sprinkle buttered crumbs evenly over the top layer.
8. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for about 1 hour or until golden brown.
